---
title: "Cosa grant website"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Cosa Grant organisation
      href: https://github.com/cosa-grant
    - icon: github
      text: Cosa TSA resources and User support 
      href: https://github.com/cosa-tsa-shop
    - icon: github
      text: Anna Smyk Cosa and TSA coordinator 
      href: https://github.com/annasmyk
    - icon: github
      text: Peter-Paul De Wolf SDC coordinator 
      href: https://github.com/ppdewolf
---
